reasoning: As of October 26, 2025, the deployment of the "Coalition of the Willing" remains strictly contingent on a ceasefire or peace agreement between Russia and Ukraine. Despite 26 nations pledging contributions to this reassurance force, peace negotiations remain stalled, with no immediate prospect of a comprehensive agreement before the end of the year. Given that only two months remain in 2025, the timeline for finalizing a peace deal, securing necessary U.S. logistical backing, and physically deploying troops or assets to Ukraine makes a deployment this year highly improbable. The community forecast of 1% strongly aligns with the current diplomatic stalemate and logistical constraints.
